intents.name: greeting
responses: Hello! I’m your AI assistant. Ask me anything—try: Help, Convert 100 USD to INR, or Weather in London.
Hey! 👋 How can I help today?
Hi there! I can convert currencies, tell jokes, share motivation, and more.

intents.name: who_are_you
responses: I’m a hackathon-style AI chatbot built with Flask + a lightweight rule engine. I can answer FAQs, do currency conversion, fetch weather (with an API key), and share jokes & motivation.
I’m your friendly chatbot assistant—fast, local-first, and designed for easy hackathon demos.

intents.name: help
responses:
Try these:
• Who are you?
• Help / What can you do?
• Convert 100 USD to INR
• Weather in London
• What time is it?
• Tell me a joke
• Give me motivation
I can: convert currencies, show weather (needs WEATHER_API_KEY), share time/date, tell jokes, and generate motivational quotes.

intents.name: faq_assistant
examples: where do you get the answers
responses: This chatbot uses simple matching (fuzzy text matching) + a local JSON knowledge base. For weather and currency it can call public APIs.
Answers come from predefined intents and templates. For some tasks (currency/weather), I fetch live data if the APIs are reachable.

intents.name: time_date
responses: Tell me your timezone or I’ll use your device time.

intents.name: joke
responses: Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs.

intents.name: motivation
responses: You don’t have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.

intents.name: greeting
responses: Goodbye! Keep building—future you will thank you. 🚀
See you later! If you need anything else, just ask.

jokes: Why do programmers hate nature? It has too many bugs.
I told my computer I needed a break… and it said: ‘No problem, I’ll go to sleep.’
Why did the Java developer wear glasses? Because they didn’t C#.
Debugging: being the detective in a crime movie where you are also the murderer.
motivational_quotes: Small steps every day add up to big results.
You’ve got this. Ship the project. Learn as you go.
Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
